auth.registerSubtitle: One account for queues, documents, the market and reports.
auth.passwordHint: At least 6 characters. Optional — you can always log in with a phone code.
auth.verifyingAccount: We sent a 6-digit code to your phone.

landing.heroSubtitle: CivicOS brings essential daily citizen services online — take a ticket, track a document, trade locally and report a problem. Transparent, efficient, in your language.
landing.servicesSubtitle: Everything a citizen needs for daily administrative life.
landing.step1Desc: Sign up in seconds with your phone number — a code is all you need.
landing.step2Desc: Take a queue ticket, submit a document, list an item, or report an issue.
landing.step3Desc: Follow your number, your file or your report live — and get notified.
landing.institutionsDesc: Hospitals, city halls, post offices, courts and tax offices manage their queues and files from a clean live dashboard.
landing.languagesDesc: Fully available in Arabic (RTL), French and English — switch anytime.
landing.finalSubtitle: Join thousands of citizens already saving time with CivicOS.

help.title: Help & Support
help.subtitle: Everything you need to get the most out of CivicOS.
help.contactDesc: Reach our support team — we usually reply within one business day.
help.q1: Do I need an account to use CivicOS?
help.a1: You can browse freely. To take a ticket, submit a document, sell or report, create a free account with your phone number.
help.a2: Enter your phone number and we send a 6-digit code. In this demo the code is shown on screen and printed to the server console.
help.q3: How do I track my queue number?
help.a3: Open the institution's live board — your number, the number being served and the estimated wait update in real time.
help.q4: How do I track an administrative file?
help.a4: Use the reference number you received when you submitted the file, or list all your files by phone number on the Documents page.
help.a5: CivicOS is open source. You can self-host it, and citizens authenticate without passwords by default using one-time codes.
help.a6: Any city. CivicOS is designed to be deployed by any municipality or country — see the documentation to add your institutions.
help.guideQueue: Take a ticket and follow the live queue from your phone.
help.guideDocuments: Submit and track administrative files by reference number.
help.guideMarket: Buy and sell locally with verified neighbours.
help.guideReports: Report urban problems and follow the municipality's fix.

flow.title: How your request is handled
flow.subtitle: From your phone to resolution — who does what, and where.

queue.citizen: Take a ticket from the queue page — you get a number, your position and an estimated wait.
queue.process: The agent opens the queue and calls numbers one by one until yours is served.
queue.notify: Your live board and account update in real time, plus an SMS when your number is called.

documents.citizen: Submit a file request — you receive a unique reference number and an expected-ready date.
documents.process: The clerk moves your file through processing → ready → delivered (or rejected), with a note each step.
documents.notify: Every status change is saved to your file history and sent to you by SMS.

market.citizen: Post a listing, or contact a seller about theirs.
market.process: Buyer and seller arrange the deal themselves; reviews build each seller's reputation.
market.notify: The seller is alerted to your interest by SMS; you both manage it from your accounts.

reports.citizen: Report a problem with a photo and location — you get a reference number.
reports.process: They acknowledge it, assign it to the responsible department, and update its status until resolved.
reports.notify: You and everyone who upvoted follow it live and are notified at each step.

account.title: My account
account.subtitle: Everything you have across CivicOS, in one place.
account.nothingTickets: You have no queue tickets yet.
account.nothingListings: You haven't posted any listings yet.
account.nothingReports: You haven't reported any issues yet.
account.loginRequired: Sign in to view your account
account.loginRequiredDesc: Your tickets, documents, listings and reports will appear here.

footer.vision: No more physical queues. No more lost documents. No more unanswered complaints.
footer.openSource: Open source — deploy it for your own city.
footer.builtFor: Built for any city, any country.
